issues: fetch_prices is called without required kwargs 'tickers' as per adapter contract
DataFrame filtering and indexing logic is incorrect and does not properly use 'date' and 'value' columns as per adapter contract
Signal logic incorrectly uses gain_pct > 6% to enter long (BUY) but spec requires entering short (SELL) on gain >6%
Exit condition retracement logic uses retracement > 3% to exit but spec requires exit after 3% price retracement (should be price move against position, i.e. retracement < -3%)
Indentation errors in code cause logic blocks to be malformed
Position sizing logic returns 5% allocation on RISK_ON which matches spec, but signal logic is reversed so allocation is incorrect
